name: Popcorn Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the popped corn in a food processor or food grinder.
2. Grind into kernel-size pieces.
3. In a large bowl, beat egg whites until frothy.
4. Add baking powder, salt, and cream of tartar to the egg whites. Beat until stiff peaks form.
5. Gradually add sugar replacement to the mixture. Beat until well blended.
6. Fold in the popcorn pieces into the stiffly beaten egg white mixture.
7. Drop teaspoonfuls of the batter onto lightly greased cookie sheets.
8. Bake at 350°F for 12 to 14 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Yield: 36 cookies.
10. Exchange 6 cookies: Negligible, 16 calories in 6 cookies.
Source: Diabetic Candy, Cookie & Dessert Cookbook by Mary Jane Finsand c. 1982 Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Nov 93.
